title: Brotherly Love
writer: Patterson Margoni, Lew Lipton, Earl Baldwin
actors: Karl Dane, George K. Arthur, Jean Arthur
plot: Oscar, a tough guard at Newberry Prison, gets into an argument with Jerry, a smallish barber. He causes Jerry to be arrested as a fugitive, and gets him sent to Newberry. It's not long before both men fall in love with Mary, the d...
